spec_match.rationale: Models the cart-mutation response with real prefetchCache and prerenderCache token choices, including both-token and single-token invalidation paths.

interactive.rationale: Cart buttons, empty-cart, speculative warm, navigation, and response-mode radios all drive live cart totals, cache pills, retained-store badges, and log output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature blurb promises targeted Clear-Site-Data invalidation for prefetch and prerender caches, and the page now lets visitors compare each targeted token directly.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers stale-vs-fresh, no-header fallback, prefetch-only clearing, prerender-only clearing, both-token clearing, and links to the sibling active-prerender race concept.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes the ChromeStatus entry, Shopify production write-up, sibling token explorer, and active-prerender race concept.

design_system.rationale: The amber warning block now uses readable text-black foreground, inline style attributes were moved into CSS classes, and the new controls use shared design-system variables.

summary: Resolved the cart-mutation critique by fixing the amber-on-amber warning text, adding response-mode radios for both/prefetch-only/prerender-only/no-header cases, surfacing cookies/cache/IndexedDB as untouched by the surgical tokens, and linking to the existing active-prerender race concept.
